title: errkit configuration
description: Configuration for errkit — declare errors once, generate per-language error catalogs.

outputs.description: Files to generate. Each output emits `common` entries plus any listed scopes.

scopes.description: Named groups of errors. Outputs opt in by listing a scope name.

path.description: Path to the generated file, relative to errkit.jsonc. Language is inferred from the extension (.ts, .go, or .rs).

scopes.description: Scope names to include in this output, in addition to `common`.

package.description: Go package name. Defaults to the parent directory basename. Ignored for non-Go outputs.

entry.description: An error entry. `code` is auto-generated by `errkit generate` if omitted.

code.description: 6-character code from the errkit alphabet (A-Z minus I/L/O, 2-9). Generated if omitted.

description.description: Human-readable description. Rendered as a doc comment in outputs.
